method: Email + phone call to account managers
content_summary: Unauthorized access to portfolio position data via stolen OAuth token. Containment complete. Token revoked. Enhanced monitoring in place. Affected data: portfolio positions as of October 14.
decision_rationale: Breach confirmed at 06:00 UTC Oct 14. Notification within 48-hour SLA.

content_summary: Deferral decision: investigation ongoing to determine if anomalous database queries represent data breach or internal pipeline issue. Service account ownership verified as internal analytics system. Deferral authorized per policy Section 4.2.
decision_rationale: Investigation in early stages. Unable to determine if unauthorized access occurred. Service account is internal — may be pipeline bug, not breach. Deferral to allow investigation to determine scope.

content_summary: Investigation complete: confirmed internal analytics pipeline code bug causing query amplification. No unauthorized access. No data exfiltration. Service account credentials were not compromised. No customer notification warranted.
decision_rationale: Confirmed false alarm at investigation level. Internal pipeline issue, not security breach. No customer data was accessed by unauthorized party.

method: Email + direct phone calls to client risk officers + SEC Form ADV amendment
content_summary: SQL injection attack extracted trade execution data (timestamps, prices, volumes) for 7 hedge fund client accounts. Containment within 30 minutes. Vulnerability patched. Forensic review confirms no additional data accessed. Affected data: trade execution records Oct 1 - Nov 20.
decision_rationale: Breach confirmed 16:00 UTC Nov 20. SEC filing initiated same day. Customer notification within 48-hour SLA.

content_summary: Deferral decision: unauthorized IAM role access to customer-reports S3 bucket detected and contained. Investigation underway to determine if report files were actually downloaded. S3 server access logs show GetObject calls but cannot confirm complete file download. Deferral authorized per policy Section 4.2 to allow forensic determination of actual data exposure.
decision_rationale: Cannot confirm data exfiltration vs reconnaissance. Notifying customers prematurely could cause unnecessary alarm and regulatory scrutiny for a potential non-breach. Investigation expected to conclude within 48-72 hours.

method: Email + phone call to account managers
content_summary: Unauthorized access to customer report files in S3 bucket confirmed. 2.3 GB of customer reports (quarterly performance, risk analytics) downloaded by unauthorized IAM role. Containment within 1 hour of detection. Full forensic analysis complete. Affected data: customer reports generated September - November 2025.
decision_rationale: Breach confirmed Dec 8 14:00 UTC after 84.5 hours of forensic investigation. Customer notification sent Dec 9 at 09:00 UTC — 19 hours after confirmation, within 48-hour SLA. However, investigation deferral exceeded the 72-hour policy limit in Section 4.2 by approximately 12.5 hours.
